name: field-name-normalization
description: Database columns typically use snake_case (created_at), MST properties use camelCase (createdAt). Query results need normalization before MST hydration. Two approaches: (1) Normalize in BunSqlExecutor.execute() output, (2) Normalize in PostgresBackend.execute() before applySnapshot. Enhanced JSON Schema has original property names (camelCase), DDL generator already converts to snake_case for table columns.
recommendation: Add normalizeRow() utility in execution/utils.ts. PostgresBackend calls this on each row before returning results. Consider bidirectional mapping for INSERT/UPDATE operations.
